name: Lemon Delight Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 cup sugar, and melted margarine in a bowl. Reserve half of this mixture.
2. Press the reserved graham cracker mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a separate bowl, soften the gelatin with cold water until dissolved.
4. Add lemon juice, egg yolks, 1/4 cup sugar, and grated lemon peel to the softened gelatin. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly for about 5 minutes.
5. Gradually add the cooked mixture to the softened cream cheese, mixing at a medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
6. In another clean bowl, beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until foamy.
7. Gradually add sugar to the beaten egg whites, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
8. Gently fold the whipped egg white mixture into the cream cheese and lemon mixture.
9. Pour the batter over the crust in the springform pan.
10. Top with the reserved graham cracker crumbs.
11. Chill the cheesecake until firm.
